targets.rawSql:
SELECT virtual.status, COUNT(job.id) AS total
FROM (VALUES 
    ('QUEUED', 1), 
    ('PENDING', 2), 
    ('RUNNING', 3)
) AS virtual(status, pos)
LEFT JOIN api_job job ON job.status = virtual.status
GROUP BY virtual.status, virtual.pos
ORDER BY virtual.pos ASC;

SELECT 
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'SUCCEEDED') AS SUCCEEDED,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'STOPPED') AS stopped_jobs,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'FAILED') AS failed_jobs,
    (COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'FAILED') * 100.0 / COUNT(*)) AS failure_rate
FROM api_job 
WHERE status IN ('STOPPED', 'FAILED', 'SUCCEEDED') 
  AND $__timeFilter(updated);

panels.description: Completed jobs (SUCCEEDED, FAILED, STOPPED) as a time series, all providers combined.
panels.title: Job completion

panels.description: This panel shows the current state of the queue.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT status, api_program.title, COUNT(*) 
FROM api_job INNER JOIN api_program ON program_id = api_program.id
WHERE status IN ('QUEUED',  'PENDING',  'RUNNING') 
GROUP BY status, api_program.title;

panels.title: Queue state by function

-- SELECT

--     (SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'FAILED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*)) AS failure_percentage
-- FROM api_job 
-- INNER JOIN api_program ON program_id = api_program.id
-- WHERE status IN ('FAILED', 'STOPPED', 'SUCCEEDED') 
--   AND $__timeFilter(updated)
-- GROUP BY api_program.title;

SELECT 
    api_program.title, 
    COUNT(*) AS total,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'FAILED') AS failed,
    ROUND((COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'FAILED') * 100.0 / COUNT(*)), 1) || '%' AS failure_rate
FROM api_job 
INNER JOIN api_program ON program_id = api_program.id
WHERE status IN ('FAILED', 'STOPPED', 'SUCCEEDED') 
  AND $__timeFilter(updated)
GROUP BY api_program.title;

panels.description: Jobs currently active (QUEUED, PENDING, RUNNING) segmented by state and provider name.
panels.title: Active jobs by status and provider

panels.description: Time jobs spend waiting in queue before being scheduled.
panels.title: Queue Wait Time (p50 / p90 / p99)

panels.description: Time successful jobs spend executing from RUNNING to SUCCEEDED, by provider.
panels.title: Job Execution Duration (p50 / p90 / p99)

panels.description: Time elapsed since the scheduler process started.
panels.title: Uptime

panels.description: Seconds since the latest completed scheduler loop iteration. Shows N/A if the scheduler has not ticked yet.
panels.title: Last Tick

panels.description: Cumulative number of completed scheduler loop iterations. A growing value means the scheduler is alive. A reset to 0 indicates a restart.
panels.title: Total Ticks

panels.description: Cumulative count of scheduler task errors.
panels.title: Task Errors (total)

panels.description: Average execution time per task, stacked. Stack height = total loop duration.
panels.title: Task Duration (avg, stacked)

panels.description: Rate of task errors broken down by task_name and error_type.
panels.title: Task Errors by task / error_type

panels.description: Rate of database statements executed per second, by database alias.
panels.title: DB Query Rate by alias
DB Query Duration Percentiles (p50 / p95 / p99)
